Name: Audi
1Q: What are the 4 rings on the Audi logo stands for?
tip1: The four affiliates companies are Audi, DKW, Horch, and Wanderer.
2Q: What is the name of Audi's celebrated all-wheel drive system?
tip2: The word quattro is now always spelled with a lower case q due to nomenclature rights derived from the trademark.
3Q: Audi engineers developed Audi Space Frame in 1993, a lightweight body of which material?
tip3: Audi has developed the ASF technology to reduce the weight of the quattro drive.
4Q: Who is the successor to the Audi 80?
tip4: With the model A4, a new model nomenclature era of Audi begins.
5Q: In which model is the most powerful 5-cylinder series engine built-in?
tip5: 2.5-litre TFSI engine powers MQB-based Audi TT RS with quattro system and 7-speed S Tronic automatic transmission.
6Q: In which body version was the first Audi RS4 (B5) offered?
tip6: Audi calls its estate/wagon models Avant.
7Q: What is the first Audi production model with a built-in diesel V12 TDI engine?
tip7: Audi Q7 V12 TDI produces 1,000 N⋅m of torque.
8Q: Which of the SUVs appeared on the market the latest?
tip8: Driven by BMW X6 and Mercedes GLE-Class Coupe sales success Audi launches model Q8.
9Q: On which basis was created the Audi R8?
tip9: Audi R8 is the first production car with full-LED headlamps.
10Q: Which model is the first on the market available with a third level of autonomous driving?
tip10: Level 3 of autonomous driving enable Audi A8 to park independently and drive up to 60km/h / 37mph on its own.
